steps: Go to https://coda.io and log in or create a free account
Click your avatar or name in the lower-left corner of any page
Scroll down to the 'API settings' section
Enter a descriptive name for the token
Optionally add restrictions (specific docs or permissions)
Copy the token shown at the top of the token list
notes: Free tier is available with full API access
You can generate multiple tokens with different restrictions for different integrations
Tokens can be restricted to specific documents for security
The token is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <token>
Rate limit is 10 requests per second per token

test_endpoint.description: Get the authenticated user's profile to verify the token
